title: 10. **AI-Generated Digital Products**
summary:
What it is: Create and sell AI-generated digital products (e.g., ebooks, courses) on platforms like ClawMart or Gumroad, focusing on high-demand topics.
Revenue model: Sales of digital products.
Time to first dollar: 1-3 days.
First action: Conduct market research to identify in-demand topics for digital products that can be created using AI tools.
Risk/blocker: Competition from existing products and the challenge of marketing and promoting AI-generated content effectively.

---
*To approve an i
